text: arXiv 2606.19250v1. Equation ∂_x(v^2). Matched concepts: Derivative, Variable, Exponentiating, Number. Derivative means a Derivative is a mathematical operation or operator that transforms one or more inputs into a result. Variable means a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse. Exponentiating means an Exponentiating is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse. Number means a Number is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse.
